productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Unisex White Dial Watch
description: Style NoteCheck out Q& Q's latest collection of watches for kids. Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by Q& Q! Now let your little one flaunt his/her timely bling with panache.  Product DetailsCase style: Black plastic round case Dial style: White dial with black and white hands Strap style: Black plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Screw to reset time  Water resistence of 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 25 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
